bullets: Donation to the USA Swimming Foundation
Optional Video Stroke Analysis (1 free analysis per year)
Can participate in events (only select if you want to go to events)
Exclusive welcome package including: Premium USMS-branded item of your choosing, USMS cap, USMS stickers, Plastic membership card
Free registration to all Swim.com USMS Fitness Series (three challenges per year) and Virtual Championships (five distances per year)
Free All American patches (once you reach All American status)
Free Go the Distance 50-mile cap (once you reach 50 miles)
